content.text:
All tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added high-enchantment surcharge in `surchargesFor`. When `item.enchantment >= 5`, adds `base * 0.3` to the surcharge total.
**Result**: All tests now pass (14 passing, 31 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal addition to existing `surchargesFor` function - introduced two constants (`HIGH_ENCHANTMENT_SURCHARGE_RATE = 0.3`, `HIGH_ENCHANTMENT_THRESHOLD = 5`) and combined the curse and high-enchantment surcharges. The existing structure (base + surcharges) was preserved.

Relevant file: `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_01-15-57_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts`

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
